lines.english: Lesson 89
lines.raw: Lesson 89 | 第89课

lines.english: For sale
lines.raw: For sale | 待售

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: Why couldn't Nigel decide?
lines.chinese: 为什么奈杰尔不能决定？
lines.raw: Why couldn't Nigel decide? | 为什么奈杰尔不能决定？

lines.english: Good afternoon.
lines.raw: Good afternoon. | 下午好。

lines.english: I believe that this house is for sale.
lines.chinese: 我想这栋房子是待售的。
lines.raw: I believe that this house is for sale. | 我想这栋房子是待售的。

lines.english: That's right.
lines.raw: That's right. | 没错。

lines.english: May I have a look at it, please?
lines.raw: May I have a look at it, please? | 我能进去看看吗？

lines.english: Yes, of course.
lines.raw: Yes, of course. | 当然可以。

lines.english: Come in.
lines.raw: Come in. | 请进。

lines.english: How long have you lived here?
lines.raw: How long have you lived here? | 你在这里住了多久了？

lines.english: I've lived here for twenty years.
lines.chinese: 我在这里住了二十年了。
lines.raw: I've lived here for twenty years. | 我在这里住了二十年了。

lines.english: Twenty years!
lines.raw: Twenty years! | 二十年了！

lines.english: That's a long time.
lines.raw: That's a long time. | 那可真久啊。

lines.english: Yes, I've been here since 1976.
lines.chinese: 是的，我从1976年就住在这里了。
lines.raw: Yes, I've been here since 1976. | 是的，我从1976年就住在这里了。

lines.english: Then why do you want to sell it?
lines.chinese: 那你为什么要卖掉它呢？
lines.raw: Then why do you want to sell it? | 那你为什么要卖掉它呢？

lines.english: Because I've just retired.
lines.raw: Because I've just retired. | 因为我刚退休。

lines.english: I want to buy a small house in the country.
lines.chinese: 我想在乡下买一栋小房子。
lines.raw: I want to buy a small house in the country. | 我想在乡下买一栋小房子。

lines.english: How much does this house cost?
lines.raw: How much does this house cost? | 这栋房子多少钱？

lines.english: That's a lot of money!
lines.raw: That's a lot of money! | 那可真是一大笔钱！

lines.english: It's worth every penny of it.
lines.raw: It's worth every penny of it. | 它值这个价。

lines.english: Well, I like the house, but I can't decide yet.
lines.chinese: 嗯，我喜欢这栋房子，但我还不能决定。
lines.raw: Well, I like the house, but I can't decide yet. | 嗯，我喜欢这栋房子，但我还不能决定。

lines.english: My wife must see it first.
lines.raw: My wife must see it first. | 我妻子必须先看看。

lines.english: Women always have the last word.
lines.raw: Women always have the last word. | 女人总是说了算。
